|instagram=villageresports |previous= |next= }} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator |lang=Hindi |b1=Boss JP |b2=SardarjiYT }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== ''''' Villager Esports - Winter Masters - 2022:''' 7th February 2022 to 6th March 2022''. *'''''Qualifiers Round 1:'''7th February to 16th February 2022'' ** '' A total of 1000 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 1 ** '' Teams to be divided into 50 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a single match'' ** '' Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 2''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 200 teams}} advance to Qualifiers Round 2.'' * '''''Qualifiers Round 2:''' 14th February to 15th February 2022'' ** '' A total of 200 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 2 ** '' Teams to be divided into 10 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play two matches'' ** '' Top 2 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 3''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 20 teams}} advance to Qualifiers Round 3 * '''''Qualifiers Round 3:''' 16th February 2022'' ** '' A total of 20 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 3 ** '' Each team will get to play a Five matches'' ** '' Top 5 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 4''. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 5 teams}} advance to Quarter Finals * '''''Quarter Finals:''' 17th February 2022 to 21st February 2022'' ** '' A total of 24 teams (5 Qualified from Qualifiers Round 3 + 19 Invited) will play in the Quarter Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Teams will compete in a round robin format ** '' 30 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days (Each team to play 20 Matches). ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 10 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Semifinals Finals.'' * '''''Semi Finals:''' 22nd February 2022 to 27th February 2022'' ** '' A total of 24 teams (10 Qualified from Quarter Finals + 14 Invited) will play in the Semi Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 3 groups''. ** '' Teams will compete in a round robin format ** '' Matches to be played over a period of 6 days (Each team to play -- Matches). ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 16 teams from the overall standings}} advance to Grand Finals.'' * '''''Grand Finals:''' 1st March 2022 to 6th March 2022'' ** '' A total of 16 Qualified teams will play in the Grand Finals'' ** ''Matches to be played over a period of 6 days (Each team to play -- Matches). ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For {{abbr|"Points Matrix"|Points Matrix}} '''Click here'''.}}}
